task_description: Call three independent services (A, B, C) to gather user analytics, product inventory, and order metrics, then aggregate the results into a unified dashboard payload.

services.name: service-a
services.description: Returns user analytics data (active users, signups, churn rate)

services.name: service-b
services.description: Returns product inventory data (total SKUs, low stock items, reorder needed)

services.name: service-c
services.description: Returns order metrics (total orders, revenue, average order value)

input_data.aggregation_instructions: Combine all three service responses into a single dashboard object with sections for users, inventory, and orders.
